topStories.title: Christy Luna: Investigators say they have a new lead in disappearance of an 8-year-old Florida girl in 1984
topStories.description: Sgt. Chris Karpinski revealed that Warren Gilbert Williams, named a person of interest in Christy Luna's 1984 disappearance, was remodeling a house when she vanished. Williams had a criminal history and died in 2016. Despite investigations, no remains were found on his property.

topStories.title: Supreme Court dismisses plea seeking ₹1 crore as fee and expenses for filing cases to 'save' former CJI
topStories.description: A Bench of Chief Justice Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi said the petition was "totally misconceived"

topStories.title: The war of signals: How Russia and China help Iran see the battlefield
topStories.description: Electronic warfare and intelligence sharing are eroding decades of US-Israeli dominance in the Gulf.

topStories.title: Chile’s new far-right president is sworn in
topStories.description: Chile’s new president Jose Antonio Kast has been sworn in, marking a sharp shift to the right in the country’s politics.

topStories.title: ‘Where is the proof?’ Supreme Court declines petition to repatriate Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose’s ashes from Japan
topStories.description: The Supreme Court declined to hear a petition for the return of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose’s remains, leading the petitioner to withdraw the case. The bench raised concerns about the authenticity of the ashes and suggested that Bose's direct heir should approach the court for action.

topStories.title: US destroys aging Iranian warplanes, video shows
topStories.description: During the war against the Islamic Republic of Iran, U.S. Central Command released video footage of strikes against aircraft that were sitting on the ground.

topStories.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell made 13 calls to lawmakers after the Justice Department opened a criminal probe into his congressional testimony about the Fed's renovations.

dailyNews.description: Pro wrestling star known as Shotzi Blackheart said Wednesday her brother was found and taken to a hospital after being reported missing in San Francisco.
